name: Docker Multi-stage FastAPI
title: Optimize Python FastAPI Dockerfile
description: Write a multi-stage Dockerfile for a FastAPI application. Use a build stage to install dependencies and a slim final stage. Ensure the app runs as a non-root user and does not include dev tools.

name: Docker Compose Full Stack
title: Docker Compose for FastAPI + PostgreSQL + Redis
description: Create a docker-compose.yml that orchestrates a FastAPI backend, PostgreSQL database, and Redis cache. Configure health checks, volume mounts for persistence, and a shared network.

name: Docker Non-Root Security
title: Secure Docker Image with Non-Root User
description: Harden a Python Docker image by creating a dedicated non-root user, dropping Linux capabilities, setting read-only filesystem where possible, and removing package manager caches.

name: Docker Build Cache Optimization
title: Optimize Docker Build Cache Layers
description: Refactor a Dockerfile to optimize layer caching. Ensure requirements.txt is copied and installed before source code is copied, so code changes don't invalidate the dependency layer.

name: Docker Image Scan
title: Automated Docker Image Vulnerability Scan
description: Create a CI step using Trivy or Grype to scan a built Docker image for known CVEs. Fail the pipeline if any CRITICAL or HIGH severity vulnerabilities are found in the image.

name: Docker Secrets Injection
title: Docker Secrets for Sensitive Config
description: Demonstrate how to inject secrets into a Docker container using Docker Secrets (not environment variables in docker-compose). Show reading the secret from /run/secrets/ at runtime.

name: Docker Health Check
title: Dockerfile HEALTHCHECK Instruction
description: Add a HEALTHCHECK instruction to a Dockerfile that periodically calls the /health endpoint of a FastAPI application and restarts the container if health checks fail consecutively.

name: Docker Entrypoint Script
title: Docker Entrypoint with DB Migration
description: Create a Docker entrypoint shell script that waits for PostgreSQL to be ready, runs Alembic database migrations, and then starts the FastAPI application with Uvicorn.

name: Docker Base Image Strategy
title: Select Optimal Docker Base Image
description: Compare python:3.12-slim, python:3.12-alpine, and python:3.12-distroless for a FastAPI app. Explain the trade-offs in image size, security surface, and compatibility. Provide a Dockerfile for the best choice.

name: Docker Compose Scaling
title: Horizontal Scaling with Docker Compose
description: Configure docker-compose.yml to scale a FastAPI backend to 3 replicas behind an Nginx load balancer. Ensure session state is externalized to Redis so any replica can serve requests.

name: Docker Logdriver Config
title: Centralized Logging with Docker Log Drivers
description: Configure Docker to route application logs to a centralized logging system (e.g., Loki or an ELK stack) using a Docker log driver. Include log format, rotation, and max-size settings.

name: Docker Signal Handling
title: Graceful Shutdown with SIGTERM Handling
description: Configure a FastAPI application in Docker to handle SIGTERM gracefully. Ensure in-flight requests are completed and the application closes database connections before exiting.
